name: Catalogizer Full QA - Android TV
description: Comprehensive end-to-end QA test bank for the Catalogizer Android TV app (v2.3.0) on Xiaomi Mi Box 4. Covers all screens, DPAD navigation, media playback, TV home screen channels, deep linking, Watch Next, favorites, settings, search, and edge cases.

challenges.name: App launches from Android TV home screen
challenges.description: Catalogizer app launches successfully from the Android TV home screen

challenges.name: App displays splash or loading screen on launch
challenges.description: Splash/loading screen displays with correct Catalogizer branding

challenges.description: First launch presents server URL configuration on the login screen
